'''''Dangers of the Core''''' is a children's picture book inclusive of stickers written by [[Jim Thomas]] and illustrated by [[Boris Vallejo]]. It is a '''[[Jedi Readers]] Step 3 (Grades 2–3)''' young readers book that was published by [[Random House]] in [[April]] [[1999]].<ref name="CargoBay" />

==Publisher's summary==
''An exciting adventure for Obi-Wan Kenobi, Qui-Gon Jinn, and Jar Jar Binks as they journey through the dangerous core of the planet Naboo.''<ref name="CargoBay" />

==Plot summary==
''Dangers of the Core'' is a re-cap of the underwater chase scene from ''Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace.''

The summary as described on the back of the book is as follows:

''"The planet Naboo is being invaded! Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan have to get to Theed and warn the Queen.Jar Jar Binks knows the best way, but it's underwater! Will they make it through the core without being gobbled up by undersea monsters? Read this colorful fully-illustrated beginner reader and find out!"''<ref name="FantasticFiction">{{WebCite|url=https://www.fantasticfiction.com/series/star-wars/dangers-of-core.htm|text=Dangers of the Core|work=[https://www.fantasticfiction.com FantasticFiction]|archivedate=20210309115814}}</ref>

==Continuity==
The book includes the [[Content cut from Star Wars|deleted scene]] of the bongo going over the waterfall on the [[Solleu River/Legends|Solleu River]].
